name: 18 Minute Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
2. In a saucepan, mix water, oil, and butter. Bring to a boil.
3. Pour the boiling mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until smooth.
4. Add buttermilk, eggs, and baking soda. Stir until batter is thin.
5. Pour the batter into a well-greased jelly roll pan.
6. Cool on a wire rack; while still warm, frost with rocky road frosting (see recipe on page XX).
